title: amborellaceae
intro: The rank Amborellaceae refers to a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of flowering plant species that share common characteristics and evolutionary relationships. It consists of a small number of genera, primarily Amborella, and is considered one of the most ancient lineages of flowering plants. The Amborellaceae family is primarily found in New Caledonia, with limited distribution in other parts of the world. The unique features and ancient lineage of the Amborellaceae family make it a subject of interest for botanists and plant evolutionary researchers.
